prompt: We want to run an International Women's Day social media campaign for R-Ladies this year. How should we set it up?
assertions: Says to get the global team's OK and request account access
Says to set a clear goal aligned with the mission, noting the mission covers all minority genders (IWD is the occasion, not the framing)
Recommends a team of volunteers and a clear task list
Says to automate and test the posting flow
Says to prepare before-campaign and after-campaign communications
Says to get permission before using other people's content or photos
